relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains cash balance data for a single account, while the outbound file contains customer eligibility data for marketing a product. No field names, concepts, or data structures overlap meaningfully. The inbound schema provides account-level financial data (cleared cash, pending deposits/withdrawals), while the outbound schema requires customer-level attributes (name, email, tenure, risk profile, investment experience) that are entirely absent from the inbound schema. These appear to be unrelated data flows serving different business purposes.
